description_long: This is a robust, traditional-style kettle with a rounded, slightly squat body and a textured, mottled black finish. The kettle features a prominent, arched black handle attached at the top, providing a secure grip for lifting and pouring. A short, angled spout extends from one side, designed for efficient pouring of hot liquids. The lid is circular and slightly domed, topped with a small, rounded knob for easy removal. The base is wide and flat, ensuring stability when placed on surfaces. The overall appearance is utilitarian with a rustic, weathered texture, suggesting durability and frequent use.
description: A sturdy, black, rounded kettle with a textured finish, arched handle, short spout, and domed lid with knob. Its utilitarian design and mottled surface evoke a sense of durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout on the left, the arched handle, and the domed lid with knob clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded body and the full arch of the handle, with the spout not visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the spout on the right, again showing the handle and lid with knob.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's attachment and the back of the kettle, with the spout not visible.
